name: Multiple employers, how wages calculated for comp in Utah?

mainEntity.name: Multiple employers, how wages calculated for comp in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.description: Insurer uses all wages from concurrent jobs at injury time for benefit rate.[2] Disclose fully. Key factors: Pay stubs from all; verify averages. Practical guidance: Provide employment history; track stubs. Higher base means better temporary disability pay.[2] Maximizes benefits.[1]
